stemHtml: Which statement correctly combines the requirements for preventing control surface flutter?

options.a: A low stiffness of the structure to which the control surface is attached and a balancing mass located in front of the control surface hinge line.
options.b: A high stiffness of the structure to which the control surface is attached and a balancing mass located in front of the control surface hinge line.
options.c: A low stiffness of the structure to which the control surface is attached and a balancing mass located behind the control surface hinge line.
options.d: A high stiffness of the structure to which the control surface is attached and a balancing mass located behind the control surface hinge line.
